title: lantana aculeata f. nivea
intro: Lantana aculeata f. nivea, also known as the snow white lantana, is a variety of shrub-like plant belonging to the Lantana genus, characterized by its compact growth habit and white, fragrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, showcasing its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Lantana aculeata f. nivea are said to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
